analysis.reasoning: Core message: The tweet denounces Democrats and a congressional investigation as an unfair 'witch hunt,' claiming lack of due process and accusing them of scamming America. Evaluation per narrative: US1 (honorable tradition) – Not promoted; the tweet does not showcase US values or traditions positively, instead alleging congressional unfairness. US2 (admirable society) – Not relevant; no praise of social groups or civil society. US3 (hostile enemies) – Partially relevant framing: it vilifies domestic political opponents (Democrats) as immoral actors 'scamming America,' but the narrative description focuses on external/global adversaries threatening the US and liberal values. Since the tweet targets domestic opponents rather than external enemies, it does not cleanly fit US3. US4 (force for good) – Not present. US5 (great international ally) – Not present. US6 (at the forefront) – Not present. Conclusion: No listed narratives are being promoted.
